title: rocket_surgeon daemon-to-client events
description: JSON-RPC 2.0 notification schemas. Events have no id and expect no response. Clients receive events after subscribing via rocket/subscribe.

TickStopped.description: rocket/tick.stopped — Forward pass paused at a tick boundary. Emitted after every step completes or when the daemon stops for any reason.

position.description: Tick position where the forward pass is now stopped.

state.description: Full session state at this tick.

TickHeartbeat.description: rocket/tick.heartbeat — Sent every 1s while the session is stopped. Keeps clients alive and provides per-rank GPU status.

uptime_seconds.description: Server uptime in seconds since process start.

elapsed_stopped_sec.description: Seconds elapsed since the session entered the stopped state.

status.description: Current activity state of this rank.

gpu_memory_used_mb.description: GPU memory currently in use on this rank, in megabytes.

gpu_memory_total_mb.description: Total GPU memory available on this rank, in megabytes.

per_rank_status.description: Status of each GPU rank in the session.

ProbeFired.description: rocket/probe.fired — A probe matched its probe point and executed its action. Contains the tensor summary if the action was 'capture'.

probe_id.description: ID of the probe that fired.

point.description: The probe point pattern that matched (model:rank:layer:component:event).

tick_id.description: Tick at which the probe fired.

tensor_summary.description: Tensor summary if the probe action was 'capture'. Null for other actions.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the probe fired.

ReplayDivergence.description: rocket/replay.divergence — A replayed tensor diverges from the original beyond tolerance. Emitted during replay when fidelity checking is enabled.

tick_id.description: The replay tick where divergence was detected.

probe_point.description: Probe point where divergence was measured.

cosine_similarity.description: Cosine similarity between original and replayed tensors. 1.0 = identical.

Error.description: rocket/error — Unrecoverable error notification. Sent when the daemon encounters a fatal condition (OOM, NCCL hang, etc.) that may not be associated with a specific request.

details.description: Additional structured context. Schema varies by error_code.

fatal.description: If true, the session is terminated and no further requests will be accepted.
